description_long: This is a well-worn brown fedora hat with a wide, slightly floppy brim and a pinched crown. The surface of the hat displays several dark, irregular stains and faded patches, giving it a rugged, weathered appearance. The crown is creased at the front and sides, typical of classic fedora styling, and the brim is unevenly shaped, with some areas appearing more curved or warped than others. There are no visible decorative elements such as ribbons, bands, or logos, and the hat appears to be made primarily of felt or a similar soft material. The overall look suggests frequent use, possibly in outdoor or urban environments. The interior is not visible, but it is likely lined with fabric for comfort.
description: A weathered brown fedora hat with a wide, floppy brim and a pinched, creased crown, marked by dark stains and faded patches.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pinched crown and prominent dark stains on the brim and crown.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the uneven brim and large dark patches on the side of the crown.
description_view_2: Rear view with a less pronounced crown pinch and more subtle discoloration on the brim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wide brim and several dark, irregular stains on the crown and brim.
